raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "A second San Diego County Superior Court Judge has prohibited the state from placing sexually violent predator Douglas Badger in a residential neighborhood in Mt. Helix.",
    "Another judge ruled that sexually violent predator Merle Wakefield would not be allowed to be placed in the same house in Mt. Helix.",
    "State Senator Brian Jones is drafting state legislation to stop the practice of repeatedly placing sexually violent predators in the same regions.",
    "Jones' bill would place a hard limit on the placement of sexually violent predators within a county to no more than 40% in any one supervisorial district.",
    "The legislation would mandate that the Director of the Department of State Hospitals publicly report annually on the number of sexually violent predators in each county and in which supervisorial district.",
    "The highest criteria for the placement of a sexually violent predator will be public safety according to Jones' proposed legislation.",
    "The burden to ensure compliance with the new policies will be placed on the Director of State Hospitals.",
    "The legislation will require the Department of State Hospitals, the Corrections and Rehabilitation Department, and CAL-FIRE to inventory which of their facilities can house sexually violent predators."
  ]
}
```
